task_text: T010: Add @use "uswds-core" as uswds; at the top of packages/styles/src/_colors.scss
T011: Replace $pathable-blue: #00365c with $pathable-blue: uswds.color("blue-warm-80v"); and update the $brand-colors map value in _colors.scss
T012: Replace $intelligent-jade: #1cae96 with $intelligent-jade: uswds.color("mint-cool-30v"); and update the $brand-colors map in _colors.scss
T013: Replace $bright-blue-brooks: #4899e8 with $bright-blue-brooks: uswds.color("blue-30v"); and update the $brand-colors map in _colors.scss
T014: Replace $tech-teal: #015a76 with $tech-teal: uswds.color("cyan-60v"); and update the $brand-colors map in _colors.scss
T015: Replace $lived-in-lime: #d3ff66 with $lived-in-lime: uswds.color("green-warm-10v"); and update the $brand-colors map in _colors.scss
T016: Replace $shilling-silver: #dde2e8 with $shilling-silver: uswds.color("gray-cool-10"); and update the $brand-colors map in _colors.scss
T017: Add @use "uswds-core" as uswds; at the top of packages/styles/src/_semantic.scss
T018: Update $pathable-color-text in _semantic.scss to reference uswds.color("blue-warm-80v") (aliasStatus: MUST)
T019: Update $pathable-color-text-muted in _semantic.scss to reference uswds.color("cyan-60v") (aliasStatus: MUST)
T020: Update $pathable-color-link in _semantic.scss to reference uswds.color("blue-30v") (aliasStatus: MUST)

T022: Update $pathable-color-focus-ring in _semantic.scss to reference uswds.color("blue-40v") (aliasStatus: MUST)
T023: Update $pathable-color-success in _semantic.scss to reference uswds.color("mint-cool-30v") (aliasStatus: MUST)
T024: Optionally update $pathable-color-bg in _semantic.scss to reference uswds.color("gray-cool-10") (aliasStatus: SHOULD)
T025: Optionally update $pathable-color-border in _semantic.scss to reference uswds.color("gray-cool-10") (aliasStatus: SHOULD)
T026: Update packages/styles/src/index.scss — Add @forward "uswds-theme"; as the first forward statement, before all existing forwards. Do NOT add @forward "uswds" (tokens-only per FR-006).
T027: Rebuild packages/styles/dist/styles.css via pnpm build and verify compilation succeeds without errors
T028: Verify backward compatibility — confirm dist/styles.css still contains --pathable-blue, --pathable-color-text, and all other --pathable-* CSS custom properties
T029: Verify tokens-only output — confirm dist/styles.css does NOT contain .usa- prefixed component classes
T030: Verify brand-to-USWDS mapping — confirm dist/styles.css contains USWDS system token hex values mapped to brand colors
